raw_cv_text:
Xiu Ying Loh
+65 9287 4531 • xiu.ying.loh@gmail.com • https://github.com/xiuyingloh
EDUCATION
Nanyang Technological University (NTU) — Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science 2017 - 2021
Graduated with honors (Cum Laude); completed capstone project on efficient Android memory management using
custom GC algorithms, published findings in university tech journal.
EXPERIENCE
Grab — Android Developer Mar 2022 - Present
Architected and implemented a modular payment gateway abstraction layer using repository pattern, reducing
transaction processing latency by 34% and enabling seamless integration of 4 new payment providers.
Designed Kotlin Coroutines-based background synchronization system for offline-first ride history, decreasing API calls
by 52% and improving app launch time from 2.8s to 1.9s for users in low-connectivity regions.
Led code review initiatives across 8-person Android team, maintaining 98% test coverage and reducing critical bugs in
production by 41% quarter-over-quarter.
ByteDance (TikTok) — Mid-Level Android Engineer Jul 2021 - Feb 2022
Optimized video rendering pipeline using ExoPlayer 2 and hardware acceleration, reducing jank frames by 67% and
achieving 60fps playback stability across 89% of Android 8+ devices.
Refactored legacy SharedPreferences usage to encrypted DataStore, securing sensitive user data and reducing app
crashes related to ANR violations by 28% within Q3.
Collaborated with ML team to integrate on-device TensorFlow Lite model for video recommendation ranking, processing
15,000+ recommendations daily with <200ms inference latency.
Shopee — Junior Android Developer Jan 2021 - Jun 2021
Developed real-time inventory sync feature using Firebase Realtime Database and WorkManager, handling 10,000+
concurrent product updates with 99.4% data consistency.
Implemented custom view hierarchy for dynamic checkout UI using Jetpack Compose (pilot phase), reducing layout
inflation time by 43% compared to XML-based approach.
Fixed 127 high-priority bugs in payment flow module, improving transaction success rate from 94.2% to 98.1% across
Southeast Asian markets.
PROJECTS
LocalMate - Community Task Marketplace — Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Firebase, Room Database, Aug 2022 - Dec 2022
Google Maps SDK
Built end-to-end Android app enabling users to post and accept local tasks with real-time location tracking, attracting
8,000+ active users in Singapore and Malaysia.
Engineered encrypted peer-to-peer messaging system using Firebase Cloud Messaging and RSA encryption,
processing 45,000+ messages daily with zero data breaches.
StockNotify - Real-time Market Alert Application — Kotlin, MVVM, Retrofit, RxJava, SQLite, Feb 2022 - May 2022
WebSocket
Developed market data streaming module using WebSocket integration with Finnhub API, delivering price alerts to
12,000+ users with <100ms latency.
Implemented sophisticated filtering and notification scheduling logic reducing battery drain by 38% through intelligent
background worker optimization.
EXTRACURRICULAR
Android Developer Community Singapore — Technical Mentor Jan 2022 - Present
Mentored 6 junior Android developers on modern architecture patterns (MVVM, MVI) and Jetpack libraries, with 5
successfully transitioning to mid-level roles within 12 months.
Organized quarterly technical workshops covering Compose migration and performance optimization, attracting 200+
attendees across Southeast Asia.
Product Hunt — Launch Contributor Jun 2022 - Present
Shipped 2 indie Android apps (LocalMate, StockNotify) achieving #3 and #8 rankings respectively on launch day with
combined 18,000+ upvotes.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – English (Fluent), Mandarin Chinese (Native), Malay (Conversational)
Technologies – Kotlin, Java, XML, Jetpack (Compose, Navigation, ViewModel, LiveData, Room, WorkManager,
DataStore), Firebase (Realtime DB, Cloud Messaging, Analytics), Retrofit, RxJava, ExoPlayer, TensorFlow Lite
Tools – Android Studio, Git, GitHub, Jira, Gradle, Firebase Console, Charles Proxy, Android Profiler, Figma
